summary: Iteration 14 testing complete. All features verified: (1) Bathtub configurator removed from /balie page - no Konfigurator link in navbar, no BalieConfiguratorCTA section, no 'Skonfiguruj wlasny wariant' button in product modal. (2) Balia catalog admin tab working with upload/download/delete functionality. (3) Balia integrations admin tab working with separate Telegram bot settings and AMO CRM funnel (shared API key from sauna settings). All 15 backend API tests passed.

issues: Group is collapsed by default and requires double-click to expand (first click collapses, second expands). Minor UX issue.

passed_tests: API: GET /api/health returns healthy status
API: Admin login works with credentials admin/220066
API: GET /api/balia-catalog/info returns available status
API: GET /api/balia-catalog/download returns 404 when no catalog (or 200 if exists)
API: POST /api/admin/balia-catalog/upload requires authentication (401)
API: DELETE /api/admin/balia-catalog requires authentication (401)
API: GET /api/admin/settings/balia-integrations requires authentication (401)
API: GET /api/admin/settings/balia-integrations returns default settings with all required fields
API: PUT /api/admin/settings/balia-integrations requires authentication (401)
API: PUT /api/admin/settings/balia-integrations saves and persists settings correctly
API: POST /api/admin/test-balia-telegram requires authentication (401)
API: POST /api/admin/test-balia-amocrm-lead requires authentication (401)
API: POST /api/contact with type='balia_order' routes correctly
API: GET /api/balia/products returns products list
API: GET /api/balia/content returns content data
FRONTEND: Balie page (/balie) loads correctly
FRONTEND: Navbar does NOT have 'Konfigurator' link (REMOVED)
FRONTEND: BalieConfiguratorCTA section does NOT exist (REMOVED)
FRONTEND: 'Skonfiguruj wlasna balie' button does NOT exist (REMOVED)
FRONTEND: Product modal does NOT have 'Skonfiguruj wlasny wariant' button (REMOVED)
FRONTEND: Product modal HAS 'Zloz zapytanie' button (working)
FRONTEND: Product modal shows heater selector and options
ADMIN: Balia 'Каталог' tab accessible (data-testid='admin-tab-balia_catalog')
ADMIN: Balia catalog shows upload UI with preview/delete buttons
ADMIN: Balia 'Интеграции' tab accessible (data-testid='admin-tab-balia_integrations')
ADMIN: Balia integrations shows Telegram section with separate bot/chatid
ADMIN: Balia integrations shows AMO CRM section with separate pipeline/fields
ADMIN: Balia integrations shows note about shared AMO API key from sauna settings
ADMIN: Balia integrations has test buttons for Telegram and AMO CRM
critical_code_review_comments: BalieLandingPage.jsx correctly removed 'configurator' from DEFAULT_ORDER and sectionComponents
BalieProducts.jsx correctly removed handleConfigure and onConfigure - no configurator button in modal
BalieHero.jsx CTA correctly scrolls to 'produkty' instead of configurator
Backend server.py has proper BaliaIntegrationSettings model with all required fields
Backend correctly routes balia orders (type starting with 'balia') to balia notification functions
Backend send_balia_amocrm_lead correctly uses sauna API key but balia-specific pipeline/fields
BaliaCatalogAdmin.jsx properly handles upload/download/delete with authentication
BaliaIntegrationsAdmin.jsx shows note about shared AMO API key from sauna settings
seed_data_creation: Test balia order created via POST /api/contact with type='balia_order'. Test balia integration settings saved and restored.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 tested: (1) Bathtub configurator removal - verified no Konfigurator link in navbar, no BalieConfiguratorCTA section, no configure button in product modal. (2) Balia catalog admin at data-testid='admin-tab-balia_catalog' with upload/preview/delete. (3) Balia integrations admin at data-testid='admin-tab-balia_integrations' with separate Telegram (bot token + chat ID) and AMO CRM (pipeline/status/fields) settings. AMO API key is shared from sauna integration_settings. Contact form with type='balia_order' routes to balia notification functions. Note: КУПЕЛИ group in admin sidebar may need double-click to expand (minor UX issue).
